title: Mob Battle Music: DELTARUNE Edition
description: This is a resource pack that adds multiple custom tracks to the mod Mob Battle Music from DELTARUNE.
body:
This is a resource pack that adds multiple custom tracks to the mod [Mob Battle Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-battle-music) from DELTARUNE.

Includes the following tracks:

- The Chase (Non Aggro)
- Heavy Footsteps (Non Aggro Sickened Mobs CWSM)
- Rude Buster (Aggro)
- Vapor Buster (Harder Mods)
- From Now On (Harder Mobs Variant 2)
- Spawn (Sickened Mobs CWSM)
- Ruder Buster (Boss Like Mobs)
- Black Knife (The Wither)
- Guardian (Ender Dragon)
- Big Shot (Player)
